themes.name: Feature Requests And Issues
themes.description: Users are requesting new features and reporting issues with the app, including problems with trading and customer support. They are also suggesting improvements to existing features.
representativeQuotes: BAD EXPERIENCE. DURING MCX TRADING ON 09 Jun 26 , MY OPTION BUY ORDER GOT STUCK
actionIdeas: Add a stochastic indicator to the app's charting tools
Implement an auto trial stop loss feature to help users avoid losses

themes.name: Easy To Use Interface
themes.description: Users praise the app's simplicity and ease of use, making it accessible to beginners. They appreciate the intuitive interface and fast access to services.
representativeQuotes: Easy Interface and Fast access to all the services
it is very easy app to manage all mutual fund
actionIdeas: Simplify the login process by adding alternative login options
Continue to prioritize user-friendly interface design to enhance overall user experience

themes.name: Easy Investment Experience
themes.description: Users praise Groww for its user-friendly interface and ease of use, making it suitable for beginners and long-term investors. They appreciate the simplicity of investing in stocks and mutual funds.
representativeQuotes: The interface is clean, SIP setup for mutual funds is simple, and buying stocks/ETFs is straightforward.
Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds.
beginner's friendly, easy to use, Familiar Environment and easy to Track portfolio.
actionIdeas: Enhance research tools and advanced trading features to cater to experienced investors.
Integrate AI-powered features to improve portfolio tracking and investment predictions.

themes.name: High Brokerage Charges
themes.description: Users are complaining about high brokerage charges and hidden fees. They are unhappy with the lack of clarity in statements and unresponsive customer service.
representativeQuotes: worst experience in app very high brokerage charges
Charging too much, as compared to other apps.
brokerage charges increased, the charges are very high rs 5 per trade
actionIdeas: Reduce brokerage charges to be competitive with other apps
Improve transparency in statements and customer communication

themes.name: Poor Customer Support
themes.description: Users are frustrated with Groww's customer support, citing unhelpful and rude representatives. Many issues remain unresolved.
representativeQuotes: Customer support is the worst. Does not help
worst customer support very bad ,really very bad they don't communicate
The support team gives generic replies which is quite frustrating.
actionIdeas: Improve customer support training and responsiveness
Implement a more personalized and language-supported support system
